Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

5.0/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Onyx Garage Door to get the job done right.

“Our garage door spring snapped during a 115-degree heatwave, leaving the door stuck open. Onyx had a technician to our Henderson home in 90 minutes. He explained how the heat affects springs and installed a high-temperature rated replacement. Professional, fast, and reasonably priced - will call them first for any future issues.”

Miguel R. Emergency Garage Door Repair
Mar 15, 2025

“After 15 years, our original builder-grade door in Summerlin was fading and noisy. The Onyx team helped us choose an insulated door that matches our home's style. They noticed our track was slightly misaligned from foundation settling and corrected it during installation. The new door operates smoothly and has reduced garage temperatures noticeably.”

Susan K. Garage Door Replacement
Feb 28, 2025

“I've used Onyx for annual maintenance on my North Las Vegas home's garage door for 5 years. Their technicians always catch small issues before they become big problems. Last visit, they spotted a worn roller I hadn't noticed and replaced it on the spot. Their knowledge of how desert conditions affect garage doors is impressive.”

James L. Preventive Maintenance
Jan 10, 2025

“Our old chain-drive opener near the Strip was so loud it woke the baby. Onyx installed a whisper-quiet belt-drive model with smartphone control. The technician took extra time to soundproof the mounting area since we share a wall with the bedroom. Night and day difference - we can come home late without disturbing anyone.”

Danielle P. Garage Door Opener Installation
Dec 5, 2024

“Our auto repair shop in the Arts District goes through garage doors quickly. Onyx installed an industrial-rated door that's held up to constant use and summer heat better than our previous three doors from other companies. Their maintenance plan keeps everything running smoothly with minimal downtime for our business.”

Thomas W. Commercial Garage Door Service
Nov 18, 2024

“Our garage in Seven Hills used to get so hot it ruined stored items. Onyx insulated the door with reflective material that's made a dramatic difference. The technician also sealed gaps we didn't realize were letting in dust. Now the space stays 25 degrees cooler in summer - worth every penny for Vegas homeowners.”

Lisa M. Garage Door Insulation
Oct 22, 2024
Onyx Garage Door

Trusted garage door professionals serving Las Vegas, NV and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
